# Getting support

Please use the right channel for your question — it keeps issues clean and gets you a faster answer.

## Documentation

Start here: **[docs.qorven.ai](https://docs.qorven.ai)**

The docs cover installation, configuration, all agents and tools, channel setup, and troubleshooting.

## Community help

- **[GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/QorvenAI/qorven/discussions)** — questions, ideas, show-and-tell. Best place for "how do I…" questions.
- **[Discord](https://qorven.ai/community)** — real-time chat with the community and maintainers.

## Bug reports

Found a reproducible bug? [Open an issue](https://github.com/QorvenAI/qorven/issues/new/choose) using the bug report template. Please search existing issues first.

## Security vulnerabilities

Do **not** open a public issue. See [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md) for responsible disclosure instructions.

## Commercial support

For dedicated support, SLA-backed assistance, or enterprise deployment help, contact **hello@qorven.ai**.

## Response expectations

This is an open-source project maintained by a small team. We aim to respond to issues within a few business days but cannot guarantee timelines. Community Discussions and Discord are often faster for general questions.
